product.title: L'Oreal Paris True Match Nude Hyaluronic Tinted Serum Foundation with 1% Hyaluronic acid, Light 2-3, 1 fl. oz.
featureBullets: Tinted Hydrating Serum Vegan Foundation: Formulated with Hyaluronic Acid to leave skin smoother and more hydrated, plus luminous mineral pigments for lightweight coverage and to brighten complexion

Hyaluronic Acid: Naturally found in the skin, Hyaluronic Acid helps enhance skin’s ability to retain moisture, Vegan makeup, Dermatologically tested, paraben- and fragrance-free, noncomedogenic, and suitable for all skin types, even sensitive skin

Illuminate Your Face: From BB creams to blush, we have all you need for a smooth, even finish, Highlight to illuminate your look, use concealer to hide imperfections or apply contouring makeup to define
Because You're Worth It: Create the look you want with our full line of makeup including foundations, concealers, highlighter makeup, brow pencils, eyeshadow palettes, lipsticks and much more
L'Oreal Paris Beauty: A leading total beauty care company based in Paris, we offer innovative products and unique expertise from beauty experts in makeup, skin care, hair care, styling and hair color
product.description: Makeup + Skincare = The Perfect Match. Introducing New True Match Nude Hyaluronic Tinted Serum foundation by L'Oreal Paris - The 1st tinted serum with 1 percent Hyaluronic Acid. With this tinted serum skin instantly looks brighter, even and feels hydrated for a nude, radiant finish. The 1% Hyaluronic acid gives skin a hydrated feel and smooths over time, while the luminous mineral pigments provide lightweight coverage for a brightened complexion. Available in 14 nude, radiant shades that blend to match a variety of skintones. Find your true match today 100% satisfaction guaranteed.* *Money back guarantee, up to $14.99 after coupon (sales tax and shipping will not be refunded). Restrictions apply. For details, call 1-855-332-9983. Valid in the 50 US/DC, 18 years of age or age of majority and older and only on purchase of a L’Oreal Paris True Match product made between 1/1/2021 and 12/31/21 with original store receipt or ship confirmation. Request must be postmarked by 1/29/22 and received by 2/13/22. Void where prohibited. Limit 1 refund per person and per household. Please allow 8-10 weeks for delivery.
product.returns: Non-returnable. Transportation of this item is subject to hazardous materials regulation

specification.value: #1,046 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #15 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides great coverage and appreciate its lightweight, smooth texture that feels like skincare. The product offers a natural-looking finish, lasts throughout the day with a setting spray, and is considered one of the best drugstore foundations. While some customers say the color matches their skin tone perfectly, others find it too dark for their complexion. Customers disagree on whether it's suitable for dry skin.

reviews.reviewTitle: "Just right" Coverage - This is a winner!
reviews.reviewText: This product is WONDERFUL! I’ve been searching forever for a foundation-type product and have accumulated too much makeup because I keep learning of something new/different that looks/sounds promising only to be utterly disappointed with how it looks on me. My bare face is sickly pale and washed out, but every foundation-type product I’ve tried ends up looking cakey and/or artificial on me, and as I’m getting older (now in my 40s), I’m having trouble with makeup leaving me looking dried out. NOT the case with this Loreal Tinted Serum! This is EXACTLY what I’ve been wanting for so long. This tint offers just the right amount of coverage, (just slightly more than sheer), to give my face a polished, healthy glow while still being sheer enough and close enough to my coloring to look natural (a no-makeup makeup look). Maybe it’s the hyaluronic acid, but it seems quite moisturizing (it really feels more like I’m applying skincare rather than makeup but it obviously is both – such a win-win!). I generally apply a light moisturizer first, but I’m not sure I’d have to - it depends how dry your skin is. It wears beautifully for at least 10-12 hours, looking to me basically the same as when I first applied it without creasing or looking cakey. It doesn’t settle into (emphasize) my fine lines, but rather has a slight softening/blurring effect. Also, it’s super easy, quick and fail-proof to apply – huge wins for my busy life. In 2 minutes, I can apply this and some lipstick and feel fully confident no matter where my day takes me. Or when I have time for a full face of makeup, it’s the perfect foundation. Having only been using it a few weeks, I can’t say for sure how long a bottle lasts, but it seems to go a long way – a few drops on each section of my face is aplenty. I can’t say enough good about this – I’m in love! Only two cautionary notes I’d offer – 1) it IS relatively thin coverage, so it doesn’t conceal dark spots or blemishes completely – if I have a noticeable acne blemish or something, I still need some concealer to fully cover it. 2) Other reviewers mentioned it being messy, and I can see that’s a possible drawback because it’s liquidy and the way the screw lid/dispenser works, it can easily get all over the bottle, etc if you’re not careful – I just make sure to draw the dispenser out & put it back in very slowly as to not smudge it all over the bottle rim. Conclusion: Unless you want or need a heavier/thicker foundation, I can’t imagine anyone not being as thrilled with this tinted serum as I am, especially for non-youthful skin that tends dryer with fine lines.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 2, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I’ve repurchased this tinted hyaluronic acid several times now, and it has become my absolute go-to. I hate, hate, hate traditional foundations (they always feel heavy and unbreathable), but I LOVE this product. Shade & Skin Tone: I use Rosie Light, and it is perfect for fair skin with red undertones or naturally rosy cheeks. It evens everything out without masking your natural complexion. After the first layer dries, I sometimes add a literal drop (just one drop, seriously) and pat it onto my cheeks for more coverage because my irish cheeks stay rosie all year. I also tried a shade darker, and it was excellent for summer - still lightweight and natural, just a bit more warmth for sunny months. Texture & Feel: This formula is incredibly lightweight and moisturizing. It feels breathable, never heavy, and it absolutely does not clog pores. There’s no smell, which I appreciate since fragrances often irritate my skin. It layers very well over CeraVe moisturizing tinted sunscreen. Still breathable and light! Performance: The coverage is soft, sheer, and glowy, but still manages to smooth out your skin tone beautifully. It layers amazingly well, as mentiined above, especially over the CeraVe Ultra Lightweight Moisturizer - truly a perfect combo. Pro Tip: Apply this tinted hyaluronic acid before your moisturizer completely dries. When the skin is still slightly damp and hydrated, the product glides on like butter and gives the smoothest, easiest blend you could imagine. It spreads effortlessly on hydrated skin, and the applicator dropper works really well to control how much you're using. Final Thoughts: This has become my everyday complexion product. Lightweight, breathable, moisturizing, easy to blend, no scent, and gorgeous natural coverage. If I could give it 10 stars, I absolutely would. If you hate heavy foundations but need to even out your skin tone or want a smooth but natural or makeup-free looking finish, then this is the product you've been looking for. Great value, great product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 21, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I was not so sure about it at first, but let me tell you. As soon as I applied it, I loved it, the coverage is buildable, so you wont have a problem when using it, it does not crack up, that was my problem with most foundations. I leaves my skin feeling and visible hydrated and like wearing a filter, it looks smooth. The color matched my skin tone perfectly and that was the biggest plus for me because I always have an issue finding one that is not too light or too dark for me, since I'm in between, I usually could wear a light tone, but in summer I could use a warmer one. It is worth every penny, and the size I feel is perfect, because you don't need that much for it to work.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Love the product, hate the packaging.
reviews.reviewText: I love this foundation because it’s so light weight I forget it’s there, and haven’t noticed any fragrance. It’s light coverage but buildable and very forgiving when blending. It has a dewy finish and I didn’t notice any creasing after a day of work. The only thing that drives me crazy is that you have to be SO CAREFUL when opening it or it’ll get all over the bottle.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Love this foundation because it gives the glassy look that I am now interested in having, easy color match. It’s very light and best to put it on with a brush.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 12, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is hands down the best light coverage, natural, buildable tinted serum. It is so flawless, very blendable, and you can use more or less. I use a damp foundation sponge to apply and use a dewy setting spray, I’m 42 and it looks amazing!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 21, 2026
Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: One of the best tinted serum I have used. It is light to medium coverage and a bit runny but feels like skin once set. Totally recommend!
Possibly the best foundation I ever tried… blends easily and perfectly stays on throughout the day 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
